Video.summary: The holdup-proof safe in Gus Lammerson's store proves anything but.
Video.title: The Holdup-Proof Safe

Video.summary: A stray dog loyal to Bill Gentry is the only witness in the murder of Susan Sayres's father.
Video.title: The Third Passenger

Video.summary: Stagecoach driver Abe Williamson hunts down two outlaws who robbed his stagecoach.
Video.title: The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon

Image.alt: The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon

Video.summary: Ex-outlaw Belle Starr goes after the D.A. who ridiculed her illiterate husband.
Video.title: A Bullet for the D.A.

Video.summary: A reporter probes reports that a general is selling guns to Natives in exchange for their property.
Video.title: The Truth Teller

Video.summary: A prospector has hit a vein, and he's not about to share it with anyone, not even his partner.
Video.title: The Breaking Point

Video.summary: John J. Pershing, fresh out of West Point, tracks the renegades who robbed and murdered two Natives.
Video.title: To Walk with Greatness

Video.summary: A princess agrees to be treated by a medical pioneer who uses a new method: blood transfusion.
Video.title: Bloodline

Video.summary: Unable to come to terms, a U.S. senator and a Supreme Court justice agree to a duel.
Video.title: A Gun Is Not a Gentleman

Image.alt: A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman
A Gun Is Not a Gentleman

Video.summary: Crew chief Yank Van Duzen walks off a mining job in protest when the foremen ignore warnings.
Video.title: Grotto of Death

Video.summary: Diamond Jim Brady is traveling through Texas by railroad and waging wild bets along the way.
Video.title: Diamond Jim Brady

Video.summary: A cowboy explores a valley allegedly haunted by monks that were massacred a century earlier.
Video.title: Phantom Procession

Video.summary: A Native acquitted of murder under Sioux law must contend with the white man's 'lynch law' justice.
Video.title: With Honesty and Integrity

Video.summary: Suspicious townspeople are drawn toward two brothers who spend their nights digging at a grave.
Video.title: Shadow of Violence

Video.summary: Hunting a large, mysterious creature.
Video.title: The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek

Image.alt: The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek

Video.summary: Partners in a mule team freighting business try to win the affections of a widow.
Video.title: Graydon's Charge

Video.summary: A San Francisco newspaperman with big plans struggles to make his business profitable.
Video.title: The Paper Dynasty

Video.summary: When Doc Holliday shoots a man who cheated him at cards, he becomes a target himself.
Video.title: The Quiet and the Fury

Video.summary: The emperor of Brazil finds himself stranded in the countryside and unable to prove his identity.
Video.title: A Kingdom for a Horse

Video.summary: An ex-convict dispenses law from his tent in a mining camp.
Video.title: The Law of the Round Tent

Image.alt: The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent

Video.summary: A minister has ambitious, but not very popular, plans of building a church in Whiskey Gulch.
Video.title: Miracle at Whiskey Gulch

Video.summary: Jeremy is a crew member on a blackbirding ship that inhumanely captures and enslaves native peoples.
Video.title: Showdown at Kamaaina Flats

Video.summary: Officials rush to send word to a bride that an escaped criminal wants to stop her wedding.
Video.title: Fort Bowie: Urgent

Video.summary: A lawyer (Ronald Reagan) sues a man who killed a boy's dog.
Video.title: Tribute to the Dog

Video.summary: California's governor hires a photographer to help him win a bet about the way horses gallop.
Video.title: The $25,000 Wager

Video.summary: A petty drunk transporting a new church bell to Volcano, Calif., decides to sell it off instead.
Video.title: A Bell for Volcano

Video.summary: A poet forges a relationship with a street waif.
Video.title: Magic Locket

Video.summary: Ronald Reagan plays a sheriff who tries enforcing the law without a gun.
Video.title: No Gun Behind His Badge

Video.summary: A minister's attempts to rebuild a church in Carson City are blocked by a saloon owner.
Video.title: Fighting Sky Pilot

Video.summary: The appointed warden of a Nevada prison tries to apprehend three notorious escaped convicts.
Video.title: Temporary Warden

Video.summary: A crew of mine developers ingeniously races against time to make it from Arizona to San Diego.
Video.title: A City Is Born

Video.summary: Everyone's deserting wagon master Ezra Meeker - except his wife and an accused murderer.
Video.title: Devil's Gate

Video.summary: A prospector helps a dentist who has been beaten and robbed by bandits.
Video.title: The Solid Gold Cavity

Video.summary: After a settler's son is taken during an Apache raid, an Army doctor leads a small band for rescue.
Video.title: The Hero of Apache Pass

Video.summary: Calamity Jane meets Wild Bill Hickok.
Video.title: A Calamity Called Jane

Video.summary: Warren takes an unreasonable dislike to his stepmother after returning to his father's ranch.
Video.title: Siege at Amelia's Kitchen

Video.summary: In the new state of New Mexico, a young woman decides to challenge the servitude system in court.
Video.title: Along Came Mariana

Video.summary: In Apache country, a missionary engages in a philosophic battle with an escaped murderer.
Video.title: A Man Called Abraham

Video.summary: A recruit and his pet mule are the only hope for a besieged cavalry patrol.
Video.title: Honor the Name Dennis Driscoll

Video.summary: A sheriff pursues deadly gunslinger Sam Bolt and finds an unlikely ally in one of Bolt's partners.
Video.title: Brute Angel

Video.summary: A likable old miner starts losing friends when his luck takes a turn for the better.
Video.title: One Fast Injun

Video.summary: Prospector Jim Otis is taken hostage by robbers after he stumbles onto their loot.
Video.title: Solid Foundation

Video.summary: A rancher fights bandits.
Video.title: The Trouble with Taxes
